name: Spider Caro
short_description: "Spider Carlo" is a thrilling 2D platform strategy game. Navigate obstacles and traps as an experimental spider, escape the lab, and explore the perilous human world. Uncover mysteries, crafting your legend with wit and bravery.
detailed_description: "Spider Caro" is a 2D platform strategy game. In this captivating world, you become a mysterious experimental spider abandoned in a laboratory. Using your exceptional silk-spinning and web-weaving abilities, you must skillfully avoid various traps and obstacles, successfully escape the lab, and embark on a thrilling journey to explore a human world filled with danger and adventure. Endless challenges await your wisdom and courage; use your agility and strategic mind to unravel puzzles and write the legendary story of Spider Caro.
about_the_game: "Spider Caro" is a 2D platform strategy game. In this captivating world, you become a mysterious experimental spider abandoned in a laboratory. Using your exceptional silk-spinning and web-weaving abilities, you must skillfully avoid various traps and obstacles, successfully escape the lab, and embark on a thrilling journey to explore a human world filled with danger and adventure. Endless challenges await your wisdom and courage; use your agility and strategic mind to unravel puzzles and write the legendary story of Spider Caro.
supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Russian
